Lance Fang

Frontend engineer with system thinking and product awareness.

Experienced in building UI systems, large-scale product frontend. Background spans product frontend development, frontend platform architecture, and independent system design projects.

Skill

Architecture & System design

  • Monorepo architecture
  • Design system management
  • Frontend scalability & state modeling
  • System design: data pipeline ,Job orchestration, infra cost optimization

Frontend Engineering

  • React ecosystem framework: React, Nextjs
  • state management: TanStack Query, Zustand
  • Testing strategy
  • i18n workflow
  • styling solutions

Platform / Backend

  • Nodejs backend: API service, crawler app
  • Data base: redis, Firestore, SQL
  • GCP deployment
  • Docker & container workflow
  • CI/CD automation
  • Infrastructure as code

Client Platforms

  • Flutter / React Native
  • Mobile build / distribution workflows

Misc

  • Understanding UI/UX methodology and possess the ability to independently design products using tools (Figma, Illustrator, etc.)
  • Programming language: JavaScript, TypeScript, Dart, Shell, Elixir, C, Scheme (by familiarity)

Experiece

Autopass

Feb 2025 - current

  • Managed and scaled 10+ React / Next.js applications using Nx monorepo, including shared internal UI libraries
  • Designed frontend architecture and state management strategy using TypeScript, TanStack Query, and Zustand, balancing performance, maintainability, and team scalability
  • Re-architected frontend payment workflows, improving maintainability, reliability, error handling in business-critical flows
  • Designed and implemented multi-language (i18n) websites and workflow
  • Built an AI-assisted website generation workflow, enabling non-engineers to create marketing pages with minimal engineering support
  • Integrated third-party services including LINE LIFF and Google Maps APIs

Pinkoi

Dec 2023 - Feb 2025

Worked on large-scale product frontend development for e-commerce platforms.

  • Led React upgrade initiative, designing gradual migration strategies, transitional APIs, routing structure to reduce technical debt
  • Participated in product add-on features, achieving an active user adoption rate of over 30% within three months post-launch.
  • Developed AI-powered seller supportive feature: product description generation, categories recommendation, merchant data analysis etc.
  • Built and maintained shared components library, including component testing and Storybook integration.
  • knowledge-sharing sessions within the team on topics such as React, Debugging with Android Emulator, and Character Encoding.

Gemini Data

Jul 2022 - Nov 2023

Focused on high-performance NoSQL graph database visualization toll with React + Pixi.js.

  • Enabled interaction with 1000+ nodes while maintaining smooth user interaction (dragging, styling, clustering)
  • Simplified rendering and API design for lightweight use cases such as documentation previews

Feversocial

Aug 2021 - Mar 2022

Worked on consumer-facing merchant marketing platforms.

  • Develop and maintain platforms for multi-platform, and marketing campaign manager for enterprise businesses.

Misc

  • Contributed to Proton l10n translation program

Projects

Bandwagon — Baseball Game Data Processing Prototype

repo

Independent project exploring system architecture beyond frontend in baseball topic, focusing on real-world constraints such as unstable data sources and limited infrastructure budget.

  • Designed a data pipeline to process unstable third-party data sources
  • Implemented a scalable job orchestration and worker architecture
  • Optimized infrastructure cost and system evolvability under strict budget constraints
  • Designed and developed a mobile client application

repo
